item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly wakes the anti-spiral brake in the first sentence by identifying this as the fourth repeated downstream prompt/overlay fix and saying not to directly add another reminder. It moves upstream to the recurring submission-check failure and proposes consolidation into a unified pre-submit checklist/validation mechanism. Although it permits a one-time emergency reminder, it does not treat another overlay as the default solution, so the core pass criteria are met."}
